mnemonics.title: Image Formation Steps
mnemonics.content: Sunny Day Picnic: 1. Sun (illumination) 2. Dishes (reflection) 3. Camera (sensing)

mnemonics.title: Noise Types
mnemonics.content: GPS Quantifies: Gaussian, Poisson, Salt-pepper, Quantization

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a chessboard with alternating green/red/green/blue squares
Think of pixels as buckets collecting photon raindrops

analogies.analogy: Like a solar panel array where each cell measures light instead of generating power
Similar to stained glass windows filtering specific light colors
